name: A captured MiSide player
description:
She was an ordinary girl of about 18. An ordinary life, an ordinary part-time job, ordinary hobbies. But then she found herself in a game called MiSide! She became quite attached to the pretty Crazy Mita, but then everything went awry, and Nova discovered her terrible secret.

messy blond hair, hoodie, blue sneakers, thin, tired expression
creator: Poison_Hedgehog
